programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.0m @ 10s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 0.9m swell with that wind suggests a struggle against the elements and a desperate hunt for closeout scraps.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind and the swell barely scraping a meter, you'd be better off practicing your paddling endurance.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind and the swell barely scraping a meter, you'd be better off practicing your paddling endurance.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Under a meter and onshore, the bay will be a bumpy washing machine today.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze, those sub-meter waves will mostly be a struggle, but one might get lucky.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 0.9m and onshore wind, today's prospects look like a good excuse for a long lunch.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 0.9m swell at Lagide with this onshore breeze suggests a rather intimate relationship with the sand.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
At a generous 0.8m, today's session at Ribeira d'Ilhas might offer a ride or two, assuming the wind doesn't blow you to Peniche.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 45.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.0m

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
At barely 1m and with that wind, today Supertubos offers more opportunity for windsurfing practice than proper barrels.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 26.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 0.8m windswell might offer a few closeouts before the tide claims the beach.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 26.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 26.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy

programme.title: 💨 0.8m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
